title: Genetic overlap and shared risk loci between autism spectrum disorder and cardiometabolic traits.
abstract: GWAS-based analysis using MiXeR and pleioFDR identifying polygenic overlap between ASD and cardiometabolic traits. 100 shared loci mapping to 124 genes; positive genetic correlation with metabolic traits (T2D rg=0.23, cholesterol rg=0.78) and negative with cardiovascular traits (coronary artery disease rg=-0.90).
